underlying_goal: Fix all bugs in an Android launcher project, with rigorous review, minimal changes, and clean git history
friction_detail: Git rebase to remove docs commits required multiple attempts due to incorrect commit ordering and conflict handling.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to fix all bugs in an Android launcher app with rigorous review; Claude implemented 6 fixes across branches, cleaned git history, and provided PR descriptions, mostly successfully with some git operation hiccups.
